items.name: Beanie
items.description:
The Pink Winter Cap gives your avatar a soft, playful look with its pastel-pink finish and cozy knit design. Perfect for winter walks, chill role-play scenes, or adding a memorable accent to your outfit. Pair it with scarves, streetwear, or holiday fits to bring warmth and style to your look.

✅ Join the Group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

🏛️ Classic Limiteds

items.name: chain 💎
items.description:
This awesome and classic iced out diamond chain necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .
